SELECT toInt128OrZero(value) AS int_value FROM test_table WHERE int_value = 0;
SELECT value, toInt128OrZero(value) AS int_value FROM test_table ORDER BY int_value;
SELECT toInt128OrZero(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value LIKE '%abc%');
SELECT t1.value, t2.num, toInt128OrZero(t1.value) AS int_value_1, toInt128OrZero(t2.num) AS int_value_2 FROM test_table t1 JOIN test_table_2 t2 ON int_value_1 < int_value_2;
WITH (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE toInt128OrZero(value) != 0) AS valid_values SELECT toInt128OrZero(value) FROM valid_values;
SELECT toInt128OrZero(value) FROM (SELECT value FROM test_table WHERE value IN (SELECT num FROM test_table_2));
